title: justicia zopilotensis
intro: Justicia zopilotensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, is native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is said to possess several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Justicia zopilotensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbs to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
